prompt: Run a SWIFT CSCF v2026 gap assessment for our organisation. Here is our current state: SWIFT zone exists but is on a shared VLAN with other internal systems. We patch critical vulnerabilities within 30 days. We use software OTP for operator MFA. SWIFT logs are collected but not reviewed and retention is 6 months. We have a general IT incident response plan but no SWIFT-specific plan. We have back-office connections to our core banking system but they are not encrypted.
key_differentiators: With skill: Rates 2.2 as RED and cites specific 3-day critical patch SLA
Without skill: Rates 2.2 as AMBER and only says SLAs are 'much tighter than 30 days' without specifics
With skill: Rates 2.4 as RED and explicitly states v2025→v2026 mandatory promotion
Without skill: Hedges 2.4 as AMBER/RED and says 'depends on your CSCF version' — fails to confirm v2026 mandatory status
